name: Bitrix24
description: Connect your OpenClaw agent to Bitrix24 Messenger

publicUrl.description: Externally reachable base URL of this gateway, used for Bitrix24 event handlers (e.g., https://bot.example.com). Falls back to BITRIX24_PUBLIC_URL env var.

clientId.description: OAuth app clientId for token refresh on the default account

clientSecret.description: OAuth app clientSecret for token refresh on the default account

registeredWebhookBase.description: Internal: last event-handler base URL registered per account. Managed by the plugin.

clientId.description: OAuth app clientId for token refresh

clientSecret.description: OAuth app clientSecret for token refresh

expiresAt.description: OAuth token expiry timestamp in unix ms

applicationToken.description: Internal: TOFU-pinned webhook authenticity token (top-level auth.application_token), captured from the first incoming webhook event. Managed by the plugin.

commandUsers.description: Bitrix user ids allowed to run control commands; '*' allows everyone. Empty = commands disabled.

clientId.description: Secret botToken (imbot.v2 fields.botToken) reused in every imbot.v2.* call. Auto-derived from webhook for webhook accounts.

webhookUrl.label: Bitrix24 Webhook URL
webhookUrl.helpText: Create at: Portal > Developer resources > Other > Inbound webhook. Enable scopes: imbot, im, disk.

bitrix24.label: Bitrix24
bitrix24.description: Chat with your OpenClaw agent through Bitrix24 Messenger.

webhookUrl.helpText: Create at: Portal > Developer resources > Other > Inbound webhook. Enable scopes: imbot, im, disk.
